ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code to which the county belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the precinct belongs to */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "voter_turnout_2020" INTEGER /* Voter turnout in the previous election */,
  "polling_place" TEXT /* Location of the polling place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the result belongs to */,
  "election_day_votes" INTEGER /* Number of election day votes for the candidate */,
  "advanced_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Number of advanced voting votes for the candidate */,
  "absentee_by_mail_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee by mail votes for the candidate */,
  "provisional_votes" INTEGER /* Number of provisional votes for the candidate */,
  "choice_total" INTEGER /* Total number of votes for the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the precinct */,
  "irregularity_flag" INTEGER /* Flag for potential voting irregularities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general, special) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the election is held */,
  "number_of_precincts" INTEGER /* Number of precincts participating in the election */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters for the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, election official, candidate) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "voting_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method (e.g., election day, advanced voting, absentee by mail, provisional) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the voting method */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Where the voting method is available (e.g., all counties, specific counties) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_result_voting_methods" (
  "election_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result */,
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting method */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the candidate using the voting method */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_result_id", "voting_method_id")
)
